verses.sanskrit: मैत्रेय उवाचनिर्वेदवादिनीमेवं मनोर्दुहितरं मुनि: ।दयालु: शालिनीमाह शुक्लाभिव्याहृतं स्मरन् ॥ १ ॥
verses.transliteration: maitreya uvācanirveda-vādinīm evaṁmanor duhitaraṁ muniḥdayāluḥ śālinīm āhaśuklābhivyāhṛtaṁ smaran
verses.text: Recalling the words of Lord Viṣṇu, the merciful sage Kardama replied as follows to Svāyambhuva Manu’s praiseworthy daughter, Devahūti, who was speaking words full of renunciation.

verses.sanskrit: ऋषिरुवाचमा खिदो राजपुत्रीत्थमात्मानं प्रत्यनिन्दिते ।भगवांस्तेऽक्षरो गर्भमदूरात्सम्प्रपत्स्यते ॥ २ ॥
verses.transliteration: ṛṣir uvācamā khido rāja-putrītthamātmānaṁ praty aninditebhagavāṁs te ’kṣaro garbhamadūrāt samprapatsyate
verses.text: The sage said: Do not be disappointed with yourself, O princess. You are actually praiseworthy. The infallible Supreme Personality of Godhead will shortly enter your womb as your son.

verses.sanskrit: धृतव्रतासि भद्रं ते दमेन नियमेन च ।तपोद्रविणदानैश्च श्रद्धया चेश्वरं भज ॥ ३ ॥
verses.transliteration: dhṛta-vratāsi bhadraṁ tedamena niyamena catapo-draviṇa-dānaiś caśraddhayā ceśvaraṁ bhaja
verses.text: You have undertaken sacred vows. God will bless you. Hence you should worship the Lord with great faith, through sensory control, religious observances, austerities and gifts of your money in charity.

verses.sanskrit: स त्वयाराधित: शुक्लो वितन्वन्मामकंयश: ।छेत्ता ते हृदयग्रन्थिमौदर्यो ब्रह्मभावन: ॥ ४ ॥
verses.transliteration: sa tvayārādhitaḥ śuklovitanvan māmakaṁ yaśaḥchettā te hṛdaya-granthimaudaryo brahma-bhāvanaḥ
verses.text: The Personality of Godhead, being worshiped by you, will spread my name and fame. He will vanquish the knot of your heart by becoming your son and teaching knowledge of Brahman.

verses.sanskrit: मैत्रेय उवाचदेवहूत्यपि संदेशं गौरवेण प्रजापते: ।सम्यक् श्रद्धाय पुरुषं कूटस्थमभजद्गुरुम् ॥ ५ ॥
verses.transliteration: maitreya uvācadevahūty api sandeśaṁgauraveṇa prajāpateḥsamyak śraddhāya puruṣaṁkūṭa-stham abhajad gurum
verses.text: Śrī Maitreya said: Devahūti was fully faithful and respectful toward the direction of her husband, Kardama, who was one of the Prajāpatis, or generators of human beings in the universe. O great sage, she thus began to worship the master of the universe, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is situated in everyone’s heart.

verses.sanskrit: तस्यां बहुतिथे काले भगवान्मधुसूदन: ।कार्दमं वीर्यमापन्नो जज्ञेऽग्निरिव दारुणि ॥ ६ ॥
verses.transliteration: tasyāṁ bahu-tithe kālebhagavān madhusūdanaḥkārdamaṁ vīryam āpannojajñe ’gnir iva dāruṇi
verses.text: After many, many years, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Madhusūdana, the killer of the demon Madhu, having entered the semen of Kardama, appeared in Devahūti just as fire comes from wood in a sacrifice.

verses.sanskrit: अवादयंस्तदा व्योम्नि वादित्राणि घनाघना: ।गायन्ति तं स्म गन्धर्वा नृत्यन्त्यप्सरसो मुदा ॥ ७ ॥
verses.transliteration: avādayaṁs tadā vyomnivāditrāṇi ghanāghanāḥgāyanti taṁ sma gandharvānṛtyanty apsaraso mudā
verses.text: At the time of His descent on earth, demigods in the form of raining clouds sounded musical instruments in the sky. The celestial musicians, the Gandharvas, sang the glories of the Lord, while celestial dancing girls known as Apsarās danced in joyful ecstasy.

verses.sanskrit: पेतु: सुमनसो दिव्या: खेचरैरपवर्जिता: ।प्रसेदुश्च दिश: सर्वा अम्भांसि च मनांसि च ॥ ८ ॥
verses.transliteration: petuḥ sumanaso divyāḥkhe-carair apavarjitāḥpraseduś ca diśaḥ sarvāambhāṁsi ca manāṁsi ca
verses.text: At the time of the Lord’s appearance, the demigods flying freely in the sky showered flowers. All the directions, all the waters and everyone’s mind became very satisfied.

verses.sanskrit: तत्कर्दमाश्रमपदं सरस्वत्या परिश्रितम् ।स्वयम्भू: साकमृषिभिर्मरीच्यादिभिरभ्ययात् ॥ ९ ॥
verses.transliteration: tat kardamāśrama-padaṁsarasvatyā pariśritamsvayambhūḥ sākam ṛṣibhirmarīcy-ādibhir abhyayāt
verses.text: Brahmā, the first-born living being, went along with Marīci and other sages to the place of Kardama’s hermitage, which was surrounded by the river Sarasvatī.

verses.sanskrit: भगवन्तं परं ब्रह्म सत्त्वेनांशेन शत्रुहन् ।तत्त्वसंख्यानविज्ञप्‍त्यै जातं विद्वानज: स्वराट् ॥ १० ॥
verses.transliteration: bhagavantaṁ paraṁ brahmasattvenāṁśena śatru-hantattva-saṅkhyāna-vijñaptyaijātaṁ vidvān ajaḥ svarāṭ
verses.text: Maitreya continued: O killer of the enemy, the unborn Lord Brahmā, who is almost independent in acquiring knowledge, could understand that a portion of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, in His quality of pure existence, had appeared in the womb of Devahūti just to explain the complete state of knowledge known as sāṅkhya-yoga.

verses.sanskrit: सभाजयन् विशुद्धेन चेतसा तच्चिकीर्षितम् ।प्रहृष्यमाणैरसुभि: कर्दमं चेदमभ्यधात् ॥ ११ ॥
verses.transliteration: sabhājayan viśuddhenacetasā tac-cikīrṣitamprahṛṣyamāṇair asubhiḥkardamaṁ cedam abhyadhāt
verses.text: After worshiping the Supreme Lord with gladdened senses and a pure heart for His intended activities as an incarnation, Brahmā spoke as follows to Kardama and Devahūti.

verses.sanskrit: ब्रह्मोवाचत्वया मेऽपचितिस्तात कल्पिता निर्व्यलीकत: ।यन्मे सञ्जगृहे वाक्यं भवान्मानद मानयन् ॥ १२ ॥
verses.transliteration: brahmovācatvayā me ’pacitis tātakalpitā nirvyalīkataḥyan me sañjagṛhe vākyaṁbhavān mānada mānayan
verses.text: Lord Brahmā said: My dear son Kardama, since you have completely accepted my instructions without duplicity, showing them proper respect, you have worshiped me properly. Whatever instructions you took from me you have carried out, and thereby you have honored me.

verses.sanskrit: एतावत्येव शुश्रूषा कार्या पितरि पुत्रकै: ।बाढमित्यनुमन्येत गौरवेण गुरोर्वच: ॥ १३ ॥
verses.transliteration: etāvaty eva śuśrūṣākāryā pitari putrakaiḥbāḍham ity anumanyetagauraveṇa guror vacaḥ
verses.text: Sons ought to render service to their father exactly to this extent. One should obey the command of his father or spiritual master with due deference, saying, “Yes, sir.”

verses.sanskrit: इमा दुहितर: सत्यस्तव वत्स सुमध्यमा: ।सर्गमेतं प्रभावै: स्वैर्बृंहयिष्यन्त्यनेकधा ॥ १४ ॥
verses.transliteration: imā duhitaraḥ satyastava vatsa sumadhyamāḥsargam etaṁ prabhāvaiḥ svairbṛṁhayiṣyanty anekadhā
verses.text: Lord Brahmā then praised Kardama Muni’s nine daughters, saying: All your thin-waisted daughters are certainly very chaste. I am sure they will increase this creation by their own descendants in various ways.

verses.sanskrit: अतस्त्वमृषिमुख्येभ्यो यथाशीलं यथारुचि ।आत्मजा: परिदेह्यद्य विस्तृणीहि यशो भुवि ॥ १५ ॥
verses.transliteration: atas tvam ṛṣi-mukhyebhyoyathā-śīlaṁ yathā-ruciātmajāḥ paridehy adyavistṛṇīhi yaśo bhuvi
verses.text: Therefore, today please give away your daughters to the foremost of the sages, with due regard for the girls’ temperaments and likings, and thereby spread your fame all over the universe.

verses.sanskrit: वेदाहमाद्यं पुरुषमवतीर्णं स्वमायया ।भूतानां शेवधिं देहं बिभ्राणं कपिलं मुने ॥ १६ ॥
verses.transliteration: vedāham ādyaṁ puruṣamavatīrṇaṁ sva-māyayābhūtānāṁ śevadhiṁ dehaṁbibhrāṇaṁ kapilaṁ mune
verses.text: O Kardama, I know that the original Supreme Personality of Godhead has now appeared as an incarnation by His internal energy. He is the bestower of all that is desired by the living entities, and He has now assumed the body of Kapila Muni.

verses.sanskrit: ज्ञानविज्ञानयोगेन कर्मणामुद्धरन् जटा: ।हिरण्यकेश: पद्माक्ष: पद्ममुद्रापदाम्बुज: ॥ १७ ॥
verses.transliteration: jñāna-vijñāna-yogenakarmaṇām uddharan jaṭāḥhiraṇya-keśaḥ padmākṣaḥpadma-mudrā-padāmbujaḥ
verses.text: By mystic yoga and the practical application of knowledge from the scriptures, Kapila Muni, who is characterized by His golden hair, His eyes just like lotus petals and His lotus feet, which bear the marks of lotus flowers, will uproot the deep-rooted desire for work in this material world.

verses.sanskrit: एष मानवि ते गर्भं प्रविष्ट: कैटभार्दन: ।अविद्यासंशयग्रन्थिं छित्त्वा गां विचरिष्यति ॥ १८ ॥
verses.transliteration: eṣa mānavi te garbhaṁpraviṣṭaḥ kaiṭabhārdanaḥavidyā-saṁśaya-granthiṁchittvā gāṁ vicariṣyati
verses.text: Lord Brahmā then told Devahūti: My dear daughter of Manu, the same Supreme Personality of Godhead who killed the demon Kaiṭabha is now within your womb. He will cut off all the knots of your ignorance and doubt. Then He will travel all over the world.

verses.sanskrit: अयं सिद्धगणाधीश: साङ्ख्याचार्यै: सुसम्मत: ।लोके कपिल इत्याख्यां गन्ता ते कीर्तिवर्धन: ॥ १९ ॥
verses.transliteration: ayaṁ siddha-gaṇādhīśaḥsāṅkhyācāryaiḥ susammataḥloke kapila ity ākhyāṁgantā te kīrti-vardhanaḥ
verses.text: Your son will be the head of all the perfected souls. He will be approved by the ācāryas expert in disseminating real knowledge, and among the people He will be celebrated by the name Kapila. As the son of Devahūti, He will increase your fame.

verses.sanskrit: मैत्रेय उवाचतावाश्वास्य जगत्स्रष्टा कुमारै: सहनारद: ।हंसो हंसेन यानेन त्रिधामपरमं ययौ ॥ २० ॥
verses.transliteration: maitreya uvācatāv āśvāsya jagat-sraṣṭākumāraiḥ saha-nāradaḥhaṁso haṁsena yānenatri-dhāma-paramaṁ yayau
verses.text: Śrī Maitreya said: After thus speaking to Kardama Muni and his wife Devahūti, Lord Brahmā, the creator of the universe, who is also known as Haṁsa, went back to the highest of the three planetary systems on his swan carrier with the four Kumāras and Nārada.

verses.sanskrit: गते शतधृतौ क्षत्त: कर्दमस्तेन चोदित: ।यथोदितं स्वदुहितृ: प्रादाद्विश्वसृजां तत: ॥ २१ ॥
verses.transliteration: gate śata-dhṛtau kṣattaḥkardamas tena coditaḥyathoditaṁ sva-duhitṝḥprādād viśva-sṛjāṁ tataḥ
verses.text: O Vidura, after the departure of Brahmā, Kardama Muni, having been ordered by Brahmā, handed over his nine daughters, as instructed, to the nine great sages who created the population of the world.

verses.sanskrit: मरीचये कलां प्रादादनसूयामथात्रये ।श्रद्धामङ्गिरसेऽयच्छत्पुलस्त्याय हविर्भुवम् ॥ २२ ॥पुलहाय गतिं युक्तां क्रतवे च क्रियां सतीम् ।ख्यातिं च भृगवेऽयच्छद्वसिष्ठायाप्यरुन्धतीम् ॥ २३ ॥
verses.transliteration: marīcaye kalāṁ prādādanasūyām athātrayeśraddhām aṅgirase ’yacchatpulastyāya havirbhuvam
verses.text: Kardama Muni handed over his daughter Kalā to Marīci, and another daughter, Anasūyā, to Atri. He delivered Śraddhā to Aṅgirā, and Havirbhū to Pulastya. He delivered Gati to Pulaha, the chaste Kriyā to Kratu, Khyāti to Bhṛgu, and Arundhatī to Vasiṣṭha.

verses.sanskrit: अथर्वणेऽददाच्छान्तिं यया यज्ञो वितन्यते ।विप्रर्षभान् कृतोद्वाहान् सदारान् समलालयत् ॥ २४ ॥
verses.transliteration: atharvaṇe ’dadāc chāntiṁyayā yajño vitanyateviprarṣabhān kṛtodvāhānsadārān samalālayat
verses.text: He delivered Śānti to Atharvā. Because of Śānti, sacrificial ceremonies are well performed. Thus he got the foremost brāhmaṇas married, and he maintained them along with their wives.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्त ऋषय: क्षत्त कृतदारा निमन्‍त्र्‍य तम् ।प्रातिष्ठन्नन्दिमापन्ना: स्वं स्वमाश्रममण्डलम् ॥ २५ ॥
verses.transliteration: tatas ta ṛṣayaḥ kṣattaḥkṛta-dārā nimantrya tamprātiṣṭhan nandim āpannāḥsvaṁ svam āśrama-maṇḍalam
verses.text: Thus married, the sages took leave of Kardama and departed full of joy, each for his own hermitage, O Vidura.

verses.sanskrit: स चावतीर्णं त्रियुगमाज्ञाय विबुधर्षभम् ।विविक्त उपसङ्गम्य प्रणम्य समभाषत ॥ २६ ॥
verses.transliteration: sa cāvatīrṇaṁ tri-yugamājñāya vibudharṣabhamvivikta upasaṅgamyapraṇamya samabhāṣata
verses.text: When Kardama Muni understood that the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the chief of all the demigods, Viṣṇu, had descended, Kardama approached Him in a secluded place, offered obeisances and spoke as follows.

verses.sanskrit: अहो पापच्यमानानां निरये स्वैरमङ्गलै: ।कालेन भूयसा नूनं प्रसीदन्तीह देवता: ॥ २७ ॥
verses.transliteration: aho pāpacyamānānāṁniraye svair amaṅgalaiḥkālena bhūyasā nūnaṁprasīdantīha devatāḥ
verses.text: Kardama Muni said: Oh, after a long time the demigods of this universe have become pleased with the suffering souls who are in material entanglement because of their own misdeeds.

verses.sanskrit: बहुजन्मविपक्‍वेन सम्यग्योगसमाधिना ।द्रष्टुं यतन्ते यतय: शून्यागारेषु यत्पदम् ॥ २८ ॥
verses.transliteration: bahu-janma-vipakvenasamyag-yoga-samādhinādraṣṭuṁ yatante yatayaḥśūnyāgāreṣu yat-padam
verses.text: After many births, mature yogīs, by complete trance in yoga, endeavor in secluded places to see the lotus feet of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

verses.sanskrit: स एव भगवानद्य हेलनं नगणय्य न: ।गृहेषु जातो ग्राम्याणां य: स्वानां पक्षपोषण: ॥ २९ ॥
verses.transliteration: sa eva bhagavān adyahelanaṁ na gaṇayya naḥgṛheṣu jāto grāmyāṇāṁyaḥ svānāṁ pakṣa-poṣaṇaḥ
verses.text: Not considering the negligence of ordinary householders like us, that very same Supreme Personality of Godhead appears in our homes just to support His devotees.

verses.sanskrit: स्वीयं वाक्यमृतं कर्तुमवतीर्णोऽसि मे गृहे ।चिकीर्षुर्भगवान् ज्ञानं भक्तानां मानवर्धन: ॥ ३० ॥
verses.transliteration: svīyaṁ vākyam ṛtaṁ kartumavatīrṇo ’si me gṛhecikīrṣur bhagavān jñānaṁbhaktānāṁ māna-vardhanaḥ
verses.text: Kardama Muni said: You, my dear Lord, who are always increasing the honor of Your devotees, have descended in my home just to fulfill Your word and disseminate the process of real knowledge.

verses.sanskrit: तान्येव तेऽभिरूपाणि रूपाणि भगवंस्तव ।यानि यानि च रोचन्ते स्वजनानामरूपिण: ॥ ३१ ॥
verses.transliteration: tāny eva te ’bhirūpāṇirūpāṇi bhagavaṁs tavayāni yāni ca rocantesva-janānām arūpiṇaḥ
verses.text: My dear Lord, although You have no material form, You have Your own innumerable forms. They truly are Your transcendental forms, which are pleasing to Your devotees.

verses.sanskrit: त्वां सूरिभिस्तत्त्वबुभुत्सयाद्धासदाभिवादार्हणपादपीठम् ।ऐश्वर्यवैराग्ययशोऽवबोध-वीर्यश्रिया पूर्तमहं प्रपद्ये ॥ ३२ ॥
verses.transliteration: tvāṁ sūribhis tattva-bubhutsayāddhāsadābhivādārhaṇa-pāda-pīṭhamaiśvarya-vairāgya-yaśo-’vabodha-vīrya-śriyā pūrtam ahaṁ prapadye
verses.text: My dear Lord, Your lotus feet are the reservoir that always deserves to receive worshipful homage from all great sages eager to understand the Absolute Truth. You are full in opulence, renunciation, transcendental fame, knowledge, strength and beauty, and therefore I surrender myself unto Your lotus feet.

verses.sanskrit: परं प्रधानं पुरुषं महान्तंकालं कविं त्रिवृतं लोकपालम् ।आत्मानुभूत्यानुगतप्रपञ्चंस्वच्छन्दशक्तिं कपिलं प्रपद्ये ॥ ३३ ॥
verses.transliteration: paraṁ pradhānaṁ puruṣaṁ mahāntaṁkālaṁ kaviṁ tri-vṛtaṁ loka-pālamātmānubhūtyānugata-prapañcaṁsvacchanda-śaktiṁ kapilaṁ prapadye
verses.text: I surrender unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead, descended in the form of Kapila, who is independently powerful and transcendental, who is the Supreme Person and the Lord of the sum total of matter and the element of time, who is the fully cognizant maintainer of all the universes under the three modes of material nature, and who absorbs the material manifestations after their dissolution.

verses.sanskrit: आ स्माभिपृच्छेऽद्य पतिं प्रजानांत्वयावतीर्णर्ण उताप्तकाम: ।परिव्रजत्पदवीमास्थितोऽहंचरिष्ये त्वां हृदि युञ्जन् विशोक: ॥ ३४ ॥
verses.transliteration: ā smābhipṛcche ’dya patiṁ prajānāṁtvayāvatīrṇarṇa utāpta-kāmaḥparivrajat-padavīm āsthito ’haṁcariṣye tvāṁ hṛdi yuñjan viśokaḥ
verses.text: Today I have something to ask from You, who are the Lord of all living entities. Since I have now been liberated by You from my debts to my father, and since all my desires are fulfilled, I wish to accept the order of an itinerant mendicant. Renouncing this family life, I wish to wander about, free from lamentation, thinking always of You in my heart.

verses.sanskrit: श्री भगवानुवाचमया प्रोक्तं हि लोकस्य प्रमाणं सत्यलौकिके ।अथाजनि मया तुभ्यं यदवोचमृतं मुने ॥ ३५ ॥
verses.transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvācamayā proktaṁ hi lokasyapramāṇaṁ satya-laukikeathājani mayā tubhyaṁyad avocam ṛtaṁ mune
verses.text: The Personality of Godhead Kapila said: Whatever I speak, whether directly or in the scriptures, is authoritative in all respects for the people of the world. O Muni, because I told you before that I would become your son, I have descended to fulfill this truth.

verses.sanskrit: एतन्मे जन्म लोकेऽस्मिन्मुमुक्षूणां दुराशयात् ।प्रसंख्यानाय तत्त्वानां सम्मतायात्मदर्शने ॥ ३६ ॥
verses.transliteration: etan me janma loke ’sminmumukṣūṇāṁ durāśayātprasaṅkhyānāya tattvānāṁsammatāyātma-darśane
verses.text: My appearance in this world is especially to explain the philosophy of Sāṅkhya, which is highly esteemed for self-realization by those desiring freedom from the entanglement of unnecessary material desires.

verses.sanskrit: एष आत्मपथोऽव्यक्तो नष्ट: कालेन भूयसा ।तं प्रवर्तयितुं देहमिमं विद्धि मया भृतम् ॥ ३७ ॥
verses.transliteration: eṣa ātma-patho ’vyaktonaṣṭaḥ kālena bhūyasātaṁ pravartayituṁ dehamimaṁ viddhi mayā bhṛtam
verses.text: This path of self-realization, which is difficult to understand, has now been lost in the course of time. Please know that I have assumed this body of Kapila to introduce and explain this philosophy to human society again.

verses.sanskrit: गच्छ कामं मयापृष्टो मयि संन्यस्तकर्मणा ।जित्वा सुदुर्जयं मृत्युममृतत्वाय मां भज ॥ ३८ ॥
verses.transliteration: gaccha kāmaṁ mayāpṛṣṭomayi sannyasta-karmaṇājitvā sudurjayaṁ mṛtyumamṛtatvāya māṁ bhaja
verses.text: Now, being sanctioned by Me, go as you desire, surrendering all your activities to Me. Conquering insurmountable death, worship Me for eternal life.

verses.sanskrit: मामात्मानं स्वयंज्योति: सर्वभूतगुहाशयम् ।आत्मन्येवात्मना वीक्ष्य विशोकोऽभयमृच्छसि ॥ ३९ ॥
verses.transliteration: mām ātmānaṁ svayaṁ-jyotiḥsarva-bhūta-guhāśayamātmany evātmanā vīkṣyaviśoko ’bhayam ṛcchasi
verses.text: In your own heart, through your intellect, you will always see Me, the supreme self-effulgent soul dwelling within the hearts of all living entities. Thus you will achieve the state of eternal life, free from all lamentation and fear.

verses.sanskrit: मात्र आध्यात्मिकीं विद्यां शमनीं सर्वकर्मणाम् ।वितरिष्ये यया चासौ भयं चातितरिष्यति ॥ ४० ॥
verses.transliteration: mātra ādhyātmikīṁ vidyāṁśamanīṁ sarva-karmaṇāmvitariṣye yayā cāsaubhayaṁ cātitariṣyati
verses.text: I shall also describe this sublime knowledge, which is the door to spiritual life, to My mother, so that she also can attain perfection and self-realization, ending all reactions to fruitive activities. Thus she also will be freed from all material fear.

verses.sanskrit: मैत्रेय उवाचएवं समुदितस्तेन कपिलेन प्रजापति: ।दक्षिणीकृत्य तं प्रीतो वनमेव जगाम ह ॥ ४१ ॥
verses.transliteration: maitreya uvācaevaṁ samuditas tenakapilena prajāpatiḥdakṣiṇī-kṛtya taṁ prītovanam eva jagāma ha
verses.text: Śrī Maitreya said: Thus when Kardama Muni, the progenitor of human society, was spoken to in fullness by his son, Kapila, he circumambulated Him, and with a good, pacified mind he at once left for the forest.

verses.sanskrit: व्रतं स आस्थितो मौनमात्मैकशरणो मुनि: ।नि:सङ्गो व्यचरत्क्षोणीमनग्निरनिकेतन: ॥ ४२ ॥
verses.transliteration: vrataṁ sa āsthito maunamātmaika-śaraṇo muniḥniḥsaṅgo vyacarat kṣoṇīmanagnir aniketanaḥ
verses.text: The sage Kardama accepted silence as a vow in order to think of the Supreme Personality of Godhead and take shelter of Him exclusively. Without association, he traveled over the surface of the globe as a sannyāsī, devoid of any relationship with fire or shelter.

verses.sanskrit: मनो ब्रह्मणि युञ्जानो यत्तत्सदसत: परम् ।गुणावभासे विगुण एकभक्त्यानुभाविते ॥ ४३ ॥
verses.transliteration: mano brahmaṇi yuñjānoyat tat sad-asataḥ paramguṇāvabhāse viguṇaeka-bhaktyānubhāvite
verses.text: He fixed his mind upon the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Parabrahman, who is beyond cause and effect, who manifests the three modes of material nature, who is beyond those three modes, and who is perceived only through unfailing devotional service.

verses.sanskrit: निरहंकृतिर्निर्ममश्च निर्द्वन्द्व: समद‍ृक् स्वद‍ृक् ।प्रत्यक्प्रशान्तधीर्धीर: प्रशान्तोर्मिरिवोदधि: ॥ ४४ ॥
verses.transliteration: nirahaṅkṛtir nirmamaś canirdvandvaḥ sama-dṛk sva-dṛkpratyak-praśānta-dhīr dhīraḥpraśāntormir ivodadhiḥ
verses.text: Thus he gradually became unaffected by the false ego of material identity and became free from material affection. Undisturbed, equal to everyone and without duality, he could indeed see himself also. His mind was turned inward and was perfectly calm, like an ocean unagitated by waves.

verses.sanskrit: वासुदेवे भगवति सर्वज्ञे प्रत्यगात्मनि ।परेण भक्तिभावेन लब्धात्मा मुक्तबन्धन: ॥ ४५ ॥
verses.transliteration: vāsudeve bhagavatisarva-jñe pratyag-ātmanipareṇa bhakti-bhāvenalabdhātmā mukta-bandhanaḥ
verses.text: He thus became liberated from conditioned life and became self-situated in transcendental devotional service to the Personality of Godhead, Vāsudeva, the omniscient Supersoul within everyone.

verses.sanskrit: आत्मानं सर्वभूतेषु भगवन्तमवस्थितम् ।अपश्यत्सर्वभूतानि भगवत्यपि चात्मनि ॥ ४६ ॥
verses.transliteration: ātmānaṁ sarva-bhūteṣubhagavantam avasthitamapaśyat sarva-bhūtānibhagavaty api cātmani
verses.text: He began to see that the Supreme Personality of Godhead is seated in everyone’s heart, and that everyone is existing on Him, because He is the Supersoul of everyone.

verses.sanskrit: इच्छाद्वेषविहीनेन सर्वत्र समचेतसा ।भगवद्भक्तियुक्तेन प्राप्ता भागवती गति: ॥ ४७ ॥
verses.transliteration: icchā-dveṣa-vihīnenasarvatra sama-cetasābhagavad-bhakti-yuktenaprāptā bhāgavatī gatiḥ
verses.text: Freed from all hatred and desire, Kardama Muni, being equal to everyone because of discharging uncontaminated devotional service, ultimately attained the path back to Godhead.
